name: Canterbury Park Holding Corp
summary: Canterbury Park Holding Corporation operates the Canterbury Park Racetrack and Casino in Shakopee, Minnesota, approximately 20 miles southwest of Minneapolis. The company conducts pari-mutuel wagering on live thoroughbred and quarter horse races (seasonal, May–September) and year-round simulcasting, hosts unbanked card games (poker and table games) at an up to 80-table Casino, provides food and beverage services, and pursues real estate development on its approximately 260-acre property through subsidiaries Canterbury Park Entertainment LLC and Canterbury Development LLC.
